basic_details.job_title: RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 59 Group C & D Posts
basic_details.post_name: Various posts under Sports Quota (Group 'C' & erstwhile Group 'D')
basic_details.short_information: The Railway Recruitment Cell, Central Railway (RRC/CR) has released an indicative notification for recruitment against the Sports Quota for the year 2026-27. The organisation invites online applications from eligible sportspersons who are citizens of India for various posts under Group 'C' and erstwhile Group 'D' categories.

important_dates.raw: Opening Date and Time for Online Applications: 15-07-2026 at 10:00 Hrs Closing Date and Time for Online Applications: 14-08-2026 at 18:00 Hrs

how_to_apply: Visit the official RRC/CR website: www.rrccr.com
Wait for the detailed notification to be published (available from 15.07.2026).
Read the detailed notification carefully for eligibility, age limit, and fee details.
Click on the online application link once activated.
Register using your email ID and mobile number.
Fill out the application form with correct details.
Upload required documents, photographs and sports certificates.
Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Opening Date and Time for Online Applications: 15-07-2026 at 10:00 Hrs Closing Date and Time for Online Applications: 14-08-2026 at 18:00 Hrs

content_sections.heading: RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Central Railway has announced 59 vacancies against the Sports Quota, distributed across three pay levels. The level-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates must be citizens of India. Candidates should be eligible sportspersons with recognised achievements in their respective sports discipline, as per the criteria to be specified in the detailed notification. Educational qualification requirements vary by Level and will be specified in the detailed notification available on the official website. Note: The indicative notification does not carry full eligibility, age limit, or application fee details - these will be published along with the detailed notification on www.rrccr.com from 15.07.2026.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official RRC/CR website: www.rrccr.com Wait for the detailed notification to be published (available from 15.07.2026). Read the detailed notification carefully for eligibility, age limit, and fee details. Click on the online application link once activated. Register using your email ID and mobile number. Fill out the application form with correct details. Upload required documents, photographs and sports certificates. Pay the application fee (if applicable). Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 Important Links
content_sections.text: Employment News Paper PDF Notification: Click Here Official Website: www.rrccr.com Office Address: Railway Recruitment Cell, Central Railway, CPM Conversion's Office Bldg., P. D'Mello Road, Wadibunder, Mumbai - 400 010.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the RRC Central Railway Sports Quota posts is 14 August 2026. Ensure you complete your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 59 vacancies announced for Sports Quota posts in the Railway Recruitment Cell, Central Railway for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q4. Where is the RRC Central Railway located?
faq.answer: The Railway Recruitment Cell, Central Railway is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400010.

faq.question: Q5. What are the different levels for which posts are available?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes posts at Level 5/4, Level 3/2, and Level 1, with varying numbers of vacancies for each.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for RRC Central Railway?
faq.answer: The official website for RRC Central Railway is www.rrccr.com. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to apply.

faq.question: Q8. When did the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the RRC Central Railway Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 started on 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is RRC/CR/01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Full Time, government jobs at the Railway Recruitment Cell, Central Railway.

faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the RRC Central Railway Sports Quota posts is 14 August 2026. Ensure you complete your application well before this deadline.
